design_philosophy: Elite, minimalist, black and white, Zara/COS/Massimo Dutti vibe. Editorial aesthetics. Heavy emphasis on mobile-first interactions, micro-animations, high-quality images, and stark contrast. NO purple/violet, pure monochrome aesthetic.

headings.family: Cormorant Garamond, Playfair Display, or Bodoni Moda (Editorial Serif)

body.family: Inter, DM Sans, or Helvetica Neue (Geometric Sans)

layout.spacing: p-8, p-12, gap-8, gap-12. Use negative space aggressively to frame content.
layout.border_radius: rounded-none (0px) - Sharp edges for a high-end editorial feel.
layout.image_aspect_ratios: Use 3:4 or 4:5 for all apparel product imagery to emphasize verticality and fashion context.

Header.jsx.classes: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 w-full bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5 transition-all duration-300
Header.jsx.instructions_to_main_agent: Mobile: Left hamburger, Center Logo, Right Cart/Account. Hamburger triggers a full-screen overlay or side drawer (bg-white) with accordion categories (e.g., GİYİM > Üst Giyim). Desktop: Logo left, center nav with hover mega-menu, right icons. Ensure body has padding-top so content is not hidden.

Footer.jsx.instructions_to_main_agent: Multi-column layout on desktop, stacked accordion layout on mobile. High contrast typography. Add customer service, corporate policies, and social media columns.

Cart.jsx.style: Clean cart page with a sticky mobile CTA and visual-only 'Complete the Look' suggestions.
Cart.jsx.instructions_to_main_agent:
1. FIX MOBILE CTA: Create a sticky bottom bar for the 'Ödemeye Geç' button on mobile viewports (`fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-40 bg-white border-t border-black/10 p-4 shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]`). 
2. STILINI TAMAMLA: The product suggestions grid MUST NOT show text or price below the image. It must only render the image in a 3:4 aspect ratio. Wrap the image in a group, and on hover (`group-hover:opacity-100`), reveal a black semi-transparent overlay with 'Detayı Gör' (See Details) text.

CartDrawer.jsx.classes: fixed inset-y-0 right-0 z-50 w-full sm:w-[400px] bg-white shadow-2xl flex flex-col
CartDrawer.jsx.instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn Sheet. Include a stark black 'Ödemeye Geç' button glued to the bottom of the drawer (`mt-auto sticky bottom-0 p-4 bg-white border-t`).

cart_suggestions_stilini_tamamla.heading: Stilini tamamla
cart_suggestions_stilini_tamamla.item_card: relative group overflow-hidden cursor-pointer aspect-[3/4] bg-muted
cart_suggestions_stilini_tamamla.item_image: w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-105
cart_suggestions_stilini_tamamla.item_hover_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-black/30 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300 flex flex-col justify-end p-4
cart_suggestions_stilini_tamamla.item_hover_text: text-white text-xs uppercase tracking-widest translate-y-4 group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-transform duration-300

sticky_mobile_cta.wrapper: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-40 bg-white border-t border-black/10 p-4 md:static md:border-none md:p-0 md:bg-transparent
sticky_mobile_cta.button: w-full bg-black text-white h-14 flex items-center justify-center text-sm uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-black/90 transition-colors

hero_images.description: Black and white fashion model in suit (Hero / Homepage banner)

product_images.description: Minimalist clothing product (Use for 'Stilini Tamamla' suggestions)
Assorted clothes B&W (Use for category thumbnails)

motion.hover: Images scale up by 1.05 over 700ms ease-out. Text and buttons fade or slide subtly.
motion.interactions: Buttons invert colors on hover (Black -> White, White -> Black border). Focus states use sharp 1px black outline.
